text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 265 

PRE_ICL_MO_COPAY_2M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Copay Standard Mail Order — Two-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a two-month supply of the drugs on this tier, 
using a standard mail order pharmacy during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files)
